name: Waypoint Reit
analysis: WPR has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 7% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.5000, stop A$2.3661, target A$2.9017 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
